testcase.name: Authentication Tests › User Registration › should register new user successfully
Authentication Tests › User Registration › should show validation error for invalid email

failure.message: auth.spec.ts:34:5 should show validation error for invalid email

testcase.failure:
[chromium] › auth.spec.ts:34:5 › Authentication Tests › User Registration › should show validation error for invalid email
Error: Timed out 10000ms waiting for expect(page).toHaveURL(expected)
Expected pattern: /register/ Received string: "http://localhost:3002/auth" Call log: - Expect "toHaveURL" with timeout 10000ms 14 × unexpected value "http://localhost:3002/auth"
at ../utils/test-helpers.ts:117
115 | */ 116 | async verifyURL(expectedPath: string) { > 117 | await expect(this.page).toHaveURL(new RegExp(expectedPath)); | ^ 118 | } 119 | 120 | /** at TestHelpers.verifyURL (/Users/benjamin/campaign manager/apps/frontend/tests/utils/test-helpers.ts:117:29) at AuthPage.navigateToRegister (/Users/benjamin/campaign manager/apps/frontend/tests/page-objects/AuthPage.ts:58:24) at /Users/benjamin/campaign manager/apps/frontend/tests/e2e/auth.spec.ts:35:7
attachment #1: screenshot (image/png) ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────── ../../test-results/auth-Authentication-Tests--12785-ion-error-for-invalid-email-chromium/test-failed-1.png ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
attachment #2: video (video/webm) ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────── ../../test-results/auth-Authentication-Tests--12785-ion-error-for-invalid-email-chromium/video.webm ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
Error Context: ../../test-results/auth-Authentication-Tests--12785-ion-error-for-invalid-email-chromium/error-context.md

testcase.name: Authentication Tests › User Registration › should show error for mismatched passwords
Authentication Tests › User Registration › should show error for duplicate email registration
Authentication Tests › User Login › should login with valid credentials
Authentication Tests › User Login › should show error for invalid credentials
Authentication Tests › User Login › should show error for non-existent user
Authentication Tests › User Login › should show validation error for empty fields
Authentication Tests › Password Reset › should initiate password reset flow
Authentication Tests › Password Reset › should show error for non-existent email in reset
Authentication Tests › Password Reset › should complete password reset with valid token
Authentication Tests › Password Reset › should show error for mismatched passwords in reset
Authentication Tests › User Logout › should logout successfully
Authentication Tests › Authentication Flow Navigation › should switch between login and register forms
Authentication Tests › Authentication Flow Navigation › should remember form data when switching tabs
Authentication Tests › Authentication Security › should not allow access to protected routes when not logged in
Authentication Tests › Authentication Security › should not allow access to auth pages when already logged in
Authentication Tests › Authentication Security › should handle session expiry gracefully
Authentication Tests › Form Validation › should validate email format in registration
Authentication Tests › Form Validation › should validate password strength
Authentication Tests › Form Validation › should validate required fields in registration
Authentication Tests › Accessibility › should have proper ARIA labels and roles
Authentication Tests › Accessibility › should be keyboard navigable
Authentication Tests › Error Handling › should handle network errors gracefully
Authentication Tests › Error Handling › should handle server errors gracefully
